name: meridian-healthcare
description: Healthcare intelligence skills for population health, risk analysis, cohort identification, governed data access, and agentic data pipeline management. Built for care managers, analysts, and data teams working with claims, pharmacy, SDOH, and clinical data.

interface.shortDescription: Population health skills with governed A2A access, agentic data pipelines, and data product catalog
interface.longDescription: A complete healthcare intelligence toolkit for Codex with governed agent-to-agent access and agentic data pipeline management. Includes 20+ MCP tools for querying member cohorts, analyzing risk drivers, generating outreach recommendations, building chart aggregates, inspecting and profiling data sources, standardizing dirty records, resolving entities, running quality gates, creating custom data sources from natural language, and publishing reusable data products — all with role-based governance, field masking, and audit logging. Designed for Drizzle ORM + Turso/SQLite.
defaultPrompt: Find high-risk diabetic members in TX and FL with transportation barriers
Analyze risk drivers for member M-1042 and recommend outreach
Generate a bar chart of members by risk tier
Inspect all data sources, profile raw_claims, then standardize them with a dry run first
Run the full agentic pipeline: inspect, profile, standardize, resolve entities, validate quality, and save the run
Create a data product called 'diabetes_care_gaps' from members and claims for high-risk diabetic members in TX
Generate tech_spcs.yml for the local inpatient risk pipeline, wait for approval, then run the Python harness from terminal
